name: printer-logs-analyzer
description: Monorepo root: run frontend + backend with one command

scripts.dev: concurrently -n fe,be -c blue,yellow "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.dev:backend: taskkill /F /IM python.exe 2>nul & timeout /t 1 /nobreak >nul & cd backend && uvicorn interface.api:app --reload --reload-dir . --host 0.0.0.0
